CIPHER.1114.cipherString: The behavior of animals does not provide moral justification for human beings to do the same.
CIPHER.1114.question: Solve this quote by Jim C. Hines that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1114.author: Jim C. Hines

CIPHER.1115.cipherString: A classic is a book that has never finished saying what it has to say.
CIPHER.1115.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Italo Calvino, written as an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1115.author: Italo Calvino

CIPHER.1116.cipherString: Imagination grows by exercise, and contrary to common belief, is more powerful in the mature than in the young.
CIPHER.1116.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by W. Somerset Maugham, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1116.author: W. Somerset Maugham

CIPHER.1117.cipherString: By all means continue destroying my possessions. I daresay I have too many.
CIPHER.1117.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Porta puzzle by J.K. Rowling using a keyword of MAGIC. What does it say?
CIPHER.1117.author: J.K. Rowling

CIPHER.1118.cipherString: Anybody can win, unless there happens to be a second entry.
CIPHER.1118.question: You look closely at one of the trophies in the school's trophy case. Etched into the back of it, you see this Nihilist Substitution encoded quote with a keyword of RACER and polybius key of COMPETITIVENESS. What does it say?

CIPHER.1119.cipherString: As long as there's pasta and Chinese food in the world, I'm okay.
CIPHER.1119.question: The following symbols were found on a slip of paper in a fortune cookie. Please decode them using the Baconian cipher.
CIPHER.1119.author: Michael Chang

CIPHER.1120.cipherString: The philosophy of the school room in one generation will be the philosophy of government in the next.
CIPHER.1120.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Abraham Lincoln encrypted as a Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1120.author: Abraham Lincoln

CIPHER.1121.cipherString: It is wrong to assume that men of immense wealth are always happy.
CIPHER.1121.question: A famous phrase by John D. Rockefeller has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution cipher with a keyword length of 4. The deciphered text starts with IT IS WRONG. What does it say?
CIPHER.1121.author: John D. Rockefeller

CIPHER.1122.cipherString: Great men are never sufficiently known but in struggles.
CIPHER.1122.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. You are told that the quote has STRUG in it corresponding to the encoded text Y A M H R W C, meaning A = ●●×; C = ●×–; H = –●×; M = –×●; R = ●●–; W = ×––; Y = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1122.author: Burke

CIPHER.1123.cipherString: Study the past, if you would divine the future.
CIPHER.1123.question: You intercept a mysterious telegram. Decoding it reveals a quote encrypted as a Baconian cipher. You are told that the cipher text OR WHO ASKED WISER VIEWS decodes to be PAST. What does it say?

CIPHER.1124.cipherString: Cinco años después de la desaparición de un abuelo, un grupo de marineros repite la ruta que él hizo en su último viaje.
CIPHER.1124.question: This summary from the book Maya Erikson y la isla oculta has been encoded as a Xenocrypt with a K1 English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.1125.cipherString: Thus shadow owes its birth to light.
CIPHER.1125.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Affine code with a=9 and b=7. What does it say?

CIPHER.1126.cipherString: Some saw stars, and some saw the spaces between them.
CIPHER.1126.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote by Lois McMaster Bujold written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.1126.author: Lois McMaster Bujold

CIPHER.1127.cipherString: Almost every reality you know at any given second is a mere ghost held in memory.
CIPHER.1127.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Howard Bloom, encoded with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TIMEPIECES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1127.author: Howard Bloom

CIPHER.1128.cipherString: If there is any person to whom you feel dislike, it is best to remain silent about them.
CIPHER.1128.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded, altered quote by R. Cecil. What does it say?
CIPHER.1128.author: R. Cecil

CIPHER.1129.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 850207 01 63425 decode to?

CIPHER.1130.cipherString: My brother and I have too good a relationship to spoil it by working together.
CIPHER.1130.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Trevor Phillips, written as an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.1130.author: Trevor Phillips

CIPHER.1131.cipherString: The dice of Zeus fall ever luckily.
CIPHER.1131.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Affine puzzle reveals a quote by Sophocles. You are told that the cipher text ZI decodes to be ZE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1131.author: Sophocles

CIPHER.1132.cipherString: Money is like manure; it's not worth a thing unless it's spread around encouraging young things to grow.
CIPHER.1132.question: The following quote by Thornton Wilder needs to be decoded with the Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1132.author: Thornton Wilder

CIPHER.1133.cipherString: Una vez que comenzó a cantar, se olvidó de los otros participantes y de la competencia. Simplemente disfrutaba de la canción.
CIPHER.1133.question: This passage is from the book ¿Quién fue Celia Cruz? and has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.

CIPHER.1134.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip under a Bunsen burner. It's a quote, encoded with a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 357 38 5220761 decode to?

CIPHER.1135.cipherString: Most humans have their patience level set a little too low, and their curiosity a bit too high.
CIPHER.1135.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this Patristocrat quote by Charles Sheffield using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains TOO LOW near the beginning of the second line, encoded as UWWGWM. What does it say?
CIPHER.1135.author: Charles Sheffield

CIPHER.1136.cipherString: If you can dream it, think about it, visualize it, then you can manifest it.
CIPHER.1136.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Debasish Mridha, M.D encoded using a Complete Columnar. The quote has THEN somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1136.author: Debasish Mridha, M.D

CIPHER.1137.cipherString: It is of more consequence to act considerately than to think sagely.
CIPHER.1137.question: A quote by Marcus Tullius Cicero has been encoded using the Porta Cipher for you to decode. The 46th through 50th cipher characters (KQUIZ) decode to be THINK. What does it say?
CIPHER.1137.author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

CIPHER.1138.cipherString: Our questions and answers are in part determined by the historical tradition in which we find ourselves.
CIPHER.1138.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Aristocrat-encrypted message. What does it say?

CIPHER.1139.cipherString: As a film actor, my job is to facilitate the director's vision. If there's something I'm doing that they don't agree with, I drop it.
CIPHER.1139.question: A quote by Nicolas Cage has been encoded using the Patristocrat Cipher with a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains A FILM, corresponding with the ciphertext letters CJYMN on the first line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1139.author: Nicolas Cage

CIPHER.1140.cipherString: Stand before the people you fear and speak your mind - even if your voice shakes.
CIPHER.1140.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Maggie Kuhn encoded in a Checkerboard. The 31st through 39th cipher units (WA WB RE RR OV DV CR WE CA) decode to be SPEAKYOUR. What does it say?
CIPHER.1140.author: Maggie Kuhn

CIPHER.1141.cipherString: Some say we need to be more patient. What we cannot, must not do is sit back and hope for the best.
CIPHER.1141.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Jo Cox encoded in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1141.author: Jo Cox

CIPHER.1142.cipherString: There's a host of scams that are evolving all the time.
CIPHER.1142.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Fractionated Morse string by Steven Novella. You are told that the quote has ALL THE in it corresponding to the encoded text N T G C Z Q S B, meaning B = ●××; C = –●●; G = ●×●; N = ●–×; Q = ×●●; S = ●●×; T = ●–●; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1142.author: Steven Novella

CIPHER.1143.cipherString: We can't save the world without food. Only people with full stomachs become environmentalists.
CIPHER.1143.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by David Brin encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has WITHOUT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1143.author: David Brin
